name: rundrill-anylearn
description: Learn anything inside your AI agent — turns the chat into a saved, plan-based course: it builds an ordered plan of tiny topics for your goal and teaches them one at a time, grounding each in trusted sources first, then drilling and checking. Several courses at once; progress remembered.

interface.shortDescription: Learn anything — a saved, plan-based course on top of your AI agent that grounds each topic, teaches it, and tracks your progress.
interface.longDescription: Tell it what you want to learn and AnyLearn turns the chat into a real course you can come back to. It interviews you briefly — your goal, your level, any deadline, and the one win that means it worked — then generates an ordered plan of very small topics scaled to your timeframe (a crash path for next week, a sustainable path for next year). It teaches one topic at a time: first it looks up trusted sources on the web and grounds the lesson in them (so you're not studying a hallucination), explains the single idea simply, runs 3-5 short drills with feedback, and ends each topic with a check. Your plan, grounding, and progress live on the RunDrill server, so you can stop and resume, keep several courses going at once, and see a day-by-day trail. For goals that need it, the course can switch on spaced review (re-surface what you learned), mistake tracking (re-drill what you got wrong), evidence tiers (Bronze→Silver→Gold), or strict prerequisites. Works for languages, exam cram, certifications, coding, chess — anything.
defaultPrompt: I want to learn something — help me build a plan and start.
Teach me the next topic in my course.
Where did we leave off in my course?
